Parametro Incorrecto
Codeunit SGA Data Received - NamedType ErrorParameter

trans-unit.source: It is not possible to receive or send a SGA warehouse document.
trans-unit.note: ESP="No se puede recibir ni enviar un documento de almacén SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnAfterConfirmPost - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: You cannot receive or send a document from the WMS warehouse.
trans-unit.note: ESP="No se puede recibir ni enviar un documento de almacén SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnAfterConfirmPostSales - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: You cannot register shipments with a SGA warehouse
trans-unit.note: ESP="No se pueden registrar envios con almacén SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeActionEventPostandPrint - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: There are lines with SGA warehouse
trans-unit.note: ESP="Existen líneas con almacén SGA."
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeActionEventPostAndPrintItemJournal - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: There are lines with SGA warehouse
trans-unit.note: ESP="Existen líneas con almacén SGA."
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeActionEventPostAndPrintLocation - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: There are lines with SGA warehouse
trans-unit.note: ESP="Existen líneas con almacén SGA."
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeActionEventPostItemJournal - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: You cannot register shipments with a SGA warehouse
trans-unit.note: ESP="No se pueden registrar envios con almacén SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeActionEventPostShipment - NamedType Error01
ESP="Almacén %1 es requerido para %2 = %3"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeCheckWarehouse - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: Warehouse %1 cannot be used because it is part of the SGA
trans-unit.note: ESP="El almacén %1 no se puede usar por ser de SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeValidateEvent - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: Warehouse %1 cannot be used because it is part of the SGA.
trans-unit.note: ESP="El almacén %1 no se puede usar por ser de SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeValidateEventLocationCode - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: The two warehouses cannot be of type SGA
trans-unit.note: ESP="Los dos almacenes no pueden ser de SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeValidateTransferFromCode - NamedType ERROR01

trans-unit.source: The two warehouses cannot be of type SGA
trans-unit.note: ESP="Los dos almacenes no pueden ser de SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnBeforeValidateTransferToCode - NamedType ERROR01

trans-unit.source: The transfer request has not been released
trans-unit.note: ESP="El pedido de transferencia no está lanzado"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnCodeOnBeforePostTransferOrder - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: The transfer order contains product %1 without SGA management
trans-unit.note: ESP="El pedido de transferencia contiene producto %1 sin gestión SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnCodeOnBeforePostTransferOrder - NamedType Error02
ESP="Ningún almacén tiene gestión SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnCodeOnBeforePostTransferOrder - NamedType Error03

trans-unit.source: Transfer order pending confirmation by the SGA
trans-unit.note: ESP="Pedido de transferencia pendiente de confirmar envío por el SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnCodeOnBeforePostTransferOrder - NamedType Error04

trans-unit.source: The material receipt must be processed by the SGA
trans-unit.note: ESP="La recepción del material se debe de realizar por el SGA"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnCodeOnBeforePostTransferOrder - NamedType Error05
ESP="Enviar,Recibir"
Codeunit SGA Events - Method OnCodeOnBeforePostTransferOrder - NamedType Text000
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - NamedType Comilla
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - NamedType LineaLote
ESP="Fecha registro incorrecta"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method AjustesStock - NamedType Error01
ESP="Saltar"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method AjustesStock - NamedType Error02

trans-unit.source: Does not exist as a item
trans-unit.note: ESP="No existe el producto "
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method AjustesStock - NamedType Error03
ESP="El envio no existe"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method AlbDevCompraDocEnvio - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: The quantity to send is greater than the quantity
trans-unit.note: ESP="La cantidad a enviar es mayor que la cantidad"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method AlbDevCompraDocEnvio - NamedType Error03
ESP="El Envio NO Existe"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method AlbVentaDocEnvio - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: The quantity to be sent is greater than the outstanding quantity.
trans-unit.note: ESP="La cantidad a enviar es mayor que la cantidad pendiente"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method AlbVentaDocEnvio - NamedType Error03

trans-unit.source: Lines sent to the SGA pending processing
trans-unit.note: ESP="Líneas enviadas al SGA pendientes de proceso"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method BorradoEnvios - NamedType Error01
ESP="El envio esta lanzado"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method BorradoEnvios - NamedType Error02

trans-unit.source: Lines sent to the SGA pending processing
trans-unit.note: ESP="Líneas enviadas al SGA pendientes de proceso"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method BorradoPedTrans - NamedType Error01
ESP="El envio esta lanzado"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method DevCompraDocEnvio - NamedType Error01
ESP="El envio debe de estar lanzado"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method DevCompraDocEnvio - NamedType Error02
ESP="Fecha incorrecta"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method EntregasExpedidas - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: There is no packing slip for this warehouse delivery
trans-unit.note: ESP="No existe albarán para esta entrega de almacén"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method EntregasExpedidas - NamedType Error02
ESP="Envio Completado"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method EnvioSGA - NamedType MSG01

trans-unit.source: There is a line item without a warehouse.
trans-unit.note: ESP="Exite una línea sin almacén"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method GestionDevolucionVenta - NamedType Error01
ESP="El almacén %1 no existe"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method GestionDevolucionVenta - NamedType Error02

trans-unit.source: Warehouse %1 does not allow returns in the SGA
trans-unit.note: ESP="EL almacén %1 no permite devoluciones en SGA"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method GestionDevolucionVenta - NamedType Error03

trans-unit.source: The receiving warehouse must be of type Quality for product %1 on line number %2
trans-unit.note: ESP="El almacen de recepción debe ser del tipo Calidad para el producto %1 en el nº linea %2"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method GestionPedidoCompra - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: Nothing to send to the SGA
trans-unit.note: ESP="Nada para enviar al SGA"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method GestionPedidoCompra - NamedType Error02
ESP="La línea no existe"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method PedidoTransferencia<--SGA - NamedType Error01
ESP="El pedido de transferencia no existe"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method PedidoTransferencia<--SGA - NamedType Error02
ESP="El envio esta lanzado"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method PedVentaDocEnvio - NamedType Error01
ESP="El envio debe de estar lanzado"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method PedVentaDocEnvio - NamedType Error02

trans-unit.source: The Shipping Address Type is incorrect.
trans-unit.note: ESP="El Tipo de Dirección de Envío es incorrecto"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method PedVentaDocEnvio - NamedType Error03
ESP="No existe la devolución de ventas"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method RecepDevVentas - NamedType Error01
ESP="Línea no existe"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method RecepDevVentas - NamedType Error02

trans-unit.source: Outstanding quantity less than quantity to be received
trans-unit.note: ESP="Cantidad pendiente menor que cantidad a recibir"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method RecepDevVentas - NamedType Error03

trans-unit.source: The purchase order does not exist
trans-unit.note: ESP="No existe el pedido de compra"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method RecepPedCompra - NamedType Error01
ESP="Línea no existe"
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method RecepPedCompra - NamedType Error02

trans-unit.source: Outstanding quantity is less than the quantity to be received
trans-unit.note: ESP="Cantidad pendiente menor que cantidad a recibir
Codeunit SGA Interfaces - Method RecepPedCompra - NamedType Error03

trans-unit.source: Insufficient product stock %1 in warehouse %2. Quantity to ship %3, quantity in stock %4
trans-unit.note: Existencia infuficiente del producto %1 en almacén %2. Cantidad a enviar %3, cantidad disponible %4
Codeunit SGA Management - Method CheckStockShipment - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: Insufficient stock of product %1 in warehouse %2. Quantity to be shipped %3, quantity available %4
trans-unit.note: ESP="Existencia infuficiente del producto %1 en almacén %2. Cantidad a enviar %3, cantidad disponible %4"
Codeunit SGA Management - Method CheckStockTransfer - NamedType Error01

Enviar SGA

trans-unit.source: The document is locked by the SGA. Do you wish to continue?

PageExtension SGA Transfer Order - Method OnDeleteRecord - NamedType CONFIRM01
ESP="Documento no borrado"
PageExtension SGA Transfer Order - Method OnDeleteRecord - NamedType ERROR01
ESP="Pedido de Transferencia enviado al SGA"
PageExtension SGA Transfer Order Subform - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: The document is locked by the WMS. IT CANNOT BE DELETED
trans-unit.note: ESP="El documento se encuentra bloqueado por el SGA. NO SE PUEDE ELIMINAR"
PageExtension SGA Warehouse Shipment - Method OnDeleteRecord - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: The shipment has been modified and must be sent to the WMS, but it has not been submitted and will not be sent\ Do you want to continue?
trans-unit.note: ESP="El envio esta modificado y se debe mandar a SGA pero no esta lanzado y no se enviara.\ ¿Desea continuar?"
PageExtension SGA Warehouse Shipment - Method OnQueryClosePage - NamedType Confirm01

trans-unit.source: Please resubmit the shipment before leaving.
trans-unit.note: ESP="Vuelva a lanzar el envio antes de salir"
PageExtension SGA Warehouse Shipment - Method OnQueryClosePage - NamedType Error01
Enviar SGA
